CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - none of above 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
129 B4 B4_DAY_DCSN_MAKING (B4) Daily Decision Making Skills CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: cognitive skills/daily decision making. 0 = Independent, 1 = Modified Independence - some difficulty in new situations only, 2 = Moderately Impaired - decisions poor; cues/supervision required, 3 = Severely Impaired - never/rarely made decisions, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
130 B5A B5A_DISTRACTED (B5A)
